summary: Tested 'Funciones de Mesa' glassmorphism redesign and dual void logic. All UI elements verified: glassmorphism modal styling, pill-style buttons, 'Anular Cuenta Entera' button. OPEN account void flow working correctly (shows cancel reasons). B04 button visible in CashRegister. CreditNoteModal accepts initialTransactionNumber prop. CLOSED account flow (B04 redirect) code reviewed but not fully tested due to no tables with active paid bills in current data.

issues: PIN input dots don't visually fill the boxes when entering PIN via hidden input - works via numpad clicks

passed_tests: Anular Cuenta Entera button styled red and spans full width
OPEN account void shows cancellation reasons dialog
Cancel dialog has 4 reason options with Auth/Retorna badges
B04 button visible in CashRegister header for admin
CreditNoteModal opens with correct title 'Re-abrir Transacción'
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js L245-369: Functions modal properly implements glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/80
Layout.js L340-353: Anular Cuenta Entera button correctly dispatches 'voidEntireOrder' event
OrderScreen.js L349-401: handleVoidEntireOrder implements dual logic checking for paidBill via billsAPI
OrderScreen.js L364-371: CLOSED account shows b04RedirectDialog with transactionNumber, ncf, total, paidAt
OrderScreen.js L2648-2725: b04RedirectDialog renders info and navigates to /cash-register?openB04=true
CashRegister.js L76-89: useEffect checks URL params for openB04=true and reads sessionStorage
CreditNoteModal.js L41-45: useEffect sets transactionNumber from initialTransactionNumber when modal opens

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All requested features verified except B04 redirect dialog (no test data with paid bills on active orders)

features_verified.glassmorphism_modal: PASS - backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/80 with gradient overlay
features_verified.pill_buttons: PASS - All buttons use rounded-full class
features_verified.anular_cuenta_button: PASS - Red styling, full width span, emits voidEntireOrder event
features_verified.open_account_void: PASS - Shows cancellation reasons dialog with options
features_verified.closed_account_void_code: PASS (code review) - billsAPI.list() check and b04RedirectDialog shown
features_verified.b04_redirect_dialog_code: PASS (code review) - Shows transaction#, NCF, total, date; navigates to /cash-register?openB04=true
features_verified.cashregister_openb04_detection: PASS (code review) - useEffect checks URL param and sessionStorage
features_verified.creditnotemodal_initial_transaction: PASS - initialTransactionNumber prop received and displayed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Funciones de Mesa modal redesign complete with glassmorphism. Dual void logic implemented: OPEN accounts show cancel reasons dialog, CLOSED accounts (with paid bill) show B04 redirect dialog. To fully test B04 flow, need a table with active order that has a paid bill. Current paid bills (trans#46,45,43,42,41) are on tables 14,15 but those orders may already be settled. CreditNoteModal pre-fills transaction number from initialTransactionNumber prop.
